metadata.description: A collection of Claude Code skills by jukben

plugins.name: adversarial-review
plugins.description: Adversarial reasoning and decision stress-testing. Pressure-test arguments, run pre-mortems, play devil's advocate, and generate structured Decision Records.

plugins.name: pr-pipeline
plugins.description: PR lifecycle skills: self-review with parallel agents, publish as draft PR, and babysit through merge with CI monitoring and review thread resolution.
